center.name: 南马德雷山脉
center.summary: 南马德雷山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Black thrush、Striped sparrow、Rusty-crowned ground sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in eastern Mexico's Sierra Madre Oriental from Tamaulipas south to Veracruz and in western Mexico's Sierra Madre del Sur from central Guerrero to Chiapas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-crowned ground sparrow is found in western Mexico's Sierra Madre Occidental, Sierra Madre del Sur, and Cordillera Neovolcanica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in the southern Sierra Madre Oriental, the Balsas River watershed, and the Sierra Madre del Sur
